title: Building Scalable AI Applications with Azure
description: Learn how to design and deploy enterprise-grade AI applications using Azure OpenAI, Azure AI Search, and other Azure AI services. This session covers architecture patterns, best practices, and real-world case studies.

title: Serverless Applications with Azure Functions
description: Deep dive into Azure Functions and serverless computing patterns. Learn about triggers, bindings, Durable Functions, and how to build event-driven architectures that scale automatically.

title: Container Orchestration with Kubernetes
description: Master container orchestration using Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS). Topics include deployments, services, ingress, monitoring, and GitOps workflows with Flux.

title: Securing Cloud Applications: Zero Trust Architecture
description: Implement Zero Trust security principles in your cloud applications. Learn about Microsoft Entra ID, managed identities, Key Vault, and network security best practices.

title: Modern Web Development with Next.js and Azure
description: Build and deploy modern web applications using Next.js, React, and Azure Static Web Apps. Covers SSR, SSG, API routes, and CI/CD pipelines.

title: Data Engineering at Scale with Azure Synapse
description: Transform your data pipelines with Azure Synapse Analytics. Learn about data integration, Apache Spark pools, serverless SQL, and building modern data warehouses.
